text.title: Linear Issue Tracking (PM Agile) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Adopting Linear OR auditing existing AND team size 1-10?

branch.when: (adopting_linear == true OR auditing == true) AND team_size <= 10
branch.question: Issues estimated AND repos / Slack identified?
